name: AimFast.Dev Trend Discovery Engine
description: Automated pipeline that collects signals from 30+ global sources nightly, processes them through an LLM pipeline, and delivers structured market intelligence: trend term scoring (Builder Score 0-100), maturity stage classification, cross-platform validation, and actionable daily reports.

capabilities.name: trend_discovery
capabilities.description: Browse 170+ emerging tech terms with filterable stage classification, sort by Builder Score, momentum, or mention volume.

capabilities.name: dashboard
capabilities.description: Daily market intelligence dashboard with watchlist, decision cards, and full LLM-generated reports.

capabilities.name: daily_reports
capabilities.description: Archived daily signal intelligence reports (3,000-6,000 chars each) with product opportunities, trend analysis, and buildable insights.

capabilities.name: articles
capabilities.description: Deep-dive signal analysis articles unpacking product opportunities with evidence, plain-English translation, and actionable steps.

capabilities.name: rss_feeds
capabilities.description: RSS feeds for articles (EN + ZH) and daily reports.

capabilities.name: llms_txt
capabilities.description: AI-readable site documentation: concise index (llms.txt) and architecture & data reference (llms-full.txt) covering pipeline architecture, data formats, site structure, and methodology principles.
